title: syntherisma consanguinea
intro: Syntherisma consanguinea is a plant species native to South America, commonly known as the "false unicorn root" due to its resemblance to the true unicorn root. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Syntherisma consanguinea include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as its use in treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Syntherisma consanguinea can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried root for various herbal remedies.
